subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Every morning, with an awakened heart, turn thou to the divine Kingdom, supplicate, and say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی هر صبحگاهی با قلب آگاهی بملکوت الهی توجه نما و تضرع کن و بگو
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for morning, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
